title: EEMB 5 PACK CR2025 Battery 3V Lithium Battery Button Coin Cell Batteries 2025 Battery for Key FOBs, calculators, Coin counters, Watches, Heart Rate Monitors, Glucose monitors and More
features: ▷CERTIFICATIONS—This is not a rechargeable battery. DO NOT Charge battery. UN 38.3 compliant. More than 400 EEMB battery models are UL certified. Search "MH20555" on UL for all EEMB UL certification information.

▷APPLICATION—EEMB CR2025 batteries for Heart rate monitors,computer memory back-Up, cameras, remote controls, calculators, thermometers, car alarms, watches, garage door openers, pet collars and stopwatches, keyless entry systems, glucose monitors, toys and games.

▷POWER LONGEVITY & ENERGY-SAVING—EEMB coin batteries are safe, environmentally friendly, free of mercury, high pressure and high energy density. Operating temperature range: -20℃ to + 60℃. Durable for long lasting performance. Less than 3% per year at room temperature. Long effective period. Superior high-speed pulse discharge characteristics. Continuous discharge stability. Will not leak in equipment during use and for two years after placed in equipment.

▷MANUFACTURER DIRECT—Global technical support. We take pride in providing the highest levels of customer satisfaction and we have over 20 years experience in lithium battery business. If you have any questions or concerns regarding our products, please send us a message and we will get back to you within 24 hours.
description: Product Description Specification: CR2025 li-MnO2 Coin Battery Non-rechargeable Battery capacity: 150 mAh Working voltage: 3 V Rated current: 0.4 mA Temperature range: -20 to + 60 ° C Diameter: 20mm Thickness: 2.5mm Weight: 2.4 g Application: Electronic scales, electronic dictionaries, car key remotes, electronic watches, thermometers, electronic kits, blood glucose meters, toys and some small appliances. Attention: Keep the battery out of the reach of children. If swallowed, seek medical attention immediately. Do not charge, disassemble, deform, short circuit, heat, set fire, etc. Do not reverse the polarity. Do not solder the battery directly. Do not mix new batteries, old batteries that have been used, or batteries of different brands or types. When discarding or storing the battery, insulate it with tape.
